preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT count(*) FROM clinlims.dictionary_category WHERE name = 'Bacteriology Flora Type'

changeSet.author: pkomena

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT count(*) FROM clinlims.dictionary d JOIN clinlims.dictionary_category dc ON dc.id = d.dictionary_category_id WHERE dc.name = 'Bacteriology Flora Type' AND d.dict_entry IN ('I','II','III','IV')

changeSet.comment: Insérer les 4 modalités I, II, III, IV dans la catégorie Bacteriology Flora Type
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO clinlims.dictionary (id, dictionary_category_id, dict_entry, is_active, lastupdated) SELECT nextval('clinlims.dictionary_seq'), (SELECT id FROM clinlims.dictionary_category WHERE name = 'Bacteriology Flora Type' LIMIT 1), entry, 'Y', NOW() FROM (VALUES ('I'), ('II'), ('III'), ('IV')) AS v(entry);

changeSet.author: pkomena

and.sqlCheck: SELECT count(*) FROM clinlims.test WHERE id = 494 AND name = 'Microscopie - Frottis Coloration Gram - Bactéries - Sécrétion vaginale - Type de flore'
SELECT count(*) FROM clinlims.dictionary d JOIN clinlims.dictionary_category dc ON dc.id = d.dictionary_category_id WHERE dc.name = 'Bacteriology Flora Type' AND d.dict_entry IN ('I','II','III','IV')
SELECT count(*) FROM clinlims.test_result WHERE test_id = 494 AND value IN ('1627','1628','1598','1692')

changeSet.comment: Migrer les test_result du test 494 vers les nouveaux dict ids (I, II, III, IV) et nettoyer les anciens
